Account.description: An account represents an external account, for example a customer business.

emailAddresses.description: A list of the account's email addresses, with one optionally marked as primary.

postalAddresses.description: A list of account's postal addresses, with one optionally marked as primary.

telephones.description: A list of the account's phone numbers, with one optionally marked as primary.

webUrls.description: A list of the account's web URLs, with one optionally marked as primary.

accountGroupBriefs.description: A list of the account's account groups.

accountRoles.description: A list of the account's roles.

accountUserAccounts.description: The users linked to the account

actions.description: Block of actions allowed by the user making the request.

creator.description: The user who created the account.

dateModified.description: The account's most recent modification date.

domains.description: The account's email domains. Users assigned to this account generally will have email addresses under one of these domains.

externalReferenceCode.description: The optional external key of this account.

keywords.description: A list of keywords describing the account.

numberOfUsers.description: The number of this account's associated users.

postalAddresses.description: The addresses linked to the account

taxonomyCategoryBriefs.description: The categories associated with this account.

AccountBrief.description: Represents an account's basic information, to be embedded in other resources. This resource's ID can be used to query the account's complete information.

roleBriefs.description: A list of the user's roles.

accountBriefs.description: The list of accounts associated with this account group.

actions.description: Block of actions allowed by the user making the request.

creator.description: The user who created the account group.

dateModified.description: The account group's most recent modification date.

AccountRole.description: A role that belongs to an account

accountId.description: The primary key of the account that owns this role.

externalReferenceCode.description: The optional external key of this account role.

roleId.description: The primary key of the underlying system role.

externalReferenceCode.description: The asset library's external reference code.

Creator.description: Represents the user who created/authored the content. Properties follow the [creator](https://schema.org/creator) specification.

additionalName.description: The user's additional name, which can be used as a middle name.

image.description: A relative URL to the user's profile image.

profileURL.description: A relative URL to the user's profile.

EmailAddress.description: Represents an email address. Properties follow the [email](https://schema.org/email) specification.

externalReferenceCode.description: The email address's external reference code.

primary.description: A flag that indicates whether this is the main email address of the user/organization.

Organization.description: Represents an organization. Organizations can contain other organizations (suborganizations). Properties follow the [Organization](https://schema.org/Organization) specification.

accountBriefs.description: The list of accounts associated with this organization.

comment.description: The text of a comment associated with the organization.

creator.description: The user who created the organization.

dateModified.description: The most recent time any of the organization's fields changed.

externalReferenceCode.description: The optional external key of this organization.

image.description: A relative URL to the organization's image.

imageExternalReferenceCode.description: The organization's image external reference code.

keywords.description: A list of keywords describing the organization.

location.description: The organization's postal information (country and region).

addressCountry.description: The organization's country. This follows the [`addressCountry`](https://schema.org/addressCountry) specification.

addressRegion.description: The organization's region. This follows the [`addressRegion`](https://schema.org/addressRegion) specification.

numberOfAccounts.description: The number of this organization's associated accounts.

numberOfOrganizations.description: The number of this organization's child organizations.

numberOfUsers.description: The number of this organization's associated users.

organizationContactInformation.description: The organization's contact information, which includes email addresses, postal addresses, phone numbers, and web URLs. This is modeled internally as a `Contact`.

emailAddresses.description: The organization's email addresses, with one optionally marked as primary.

postalAddresses.description: The organization's postal addresses, with one optionally marked as primary.

telephones.description: The organization's phones numbers, with one optionally marked as primary.

webUrls.description: The organization's web URLs, with one optionally marked as primary.

roleBriefs.description: The list of roles associated with this organization.

services.description: A list of services the organization provides. This follows the [`Service`](https://www.schema.org/Service) specification.

hoursAvailable.description: A list of hours when the organization is open. This follows the [`OpeningHoursSpecification`](https://www.schema.org/OpeningHoursSpecification) specification.

serviceType.description: The type of service the organization provides.

taxonomyCategoryBriefs.description: The categories associated with this organization.

treePath.description: The tree path of the organization.

userAccountBriefs.description: The list of users associated with this organization.

OrganizationBrief.description: Represents an organization's basic information, to be embedded in other resources. This resource's ID can be used to query the organization's complete information.

roleBriefs.description: A list of the user's roles.

Phone.description: Represents a phone number. This follows the [telephone](https://schema.org/telephone) specification.

externalReferenceCode.description: The phone number's external reference code.

phoneNumber.description: The phone number without its extension.

primary.description: A flag that identifies whether this is the main phone number of the user/organization.

PostalAddress.description: Represents a mailing address. This follows the [`PostalAddress`](https://www.schema.org/PostalAddress) specification.

externalReferenceCode.description: The optional external key of this address.

postalCode.description: The address's postal code (e.g., zip code).

primary.description: A flag that identifies whether this is the main address of the user/organization.

streetAddressLine1.description: The street address's first line (e.g., 1600 Amphitheatre Pkwy.).

Role.description: Represents a relationship between a user and a company or site. This follows the [`Role`](https://www.schema.org/Role) specification.

actions.description: Block of actions that the user can perform with the roles.

availableLanguages.description: A list of languages for which the role has a translation.

dateModified.description: The last time any of the role's fields were changed.

externalReferenceCode.description: The optional external key of this role.

RoleBrief.description: Represents a role's basic information, to be embedded with other resources. The ID of this resource can be used to query the role's complete information.

Segment.description: Represents a set of users that meet certain criteria. Segments may be used to create customized experiences for users.

active.description: A flag that indicates whether the segment is active.

dateModified.description: The segment's most recent modification date.

siteId.description: The ID of the segment's site.

SegmentUser.description: Represents a user who belongs to a segment.

actions.description: Block of actions allowed by the user making the request.

externalReferenceCode.description: The shared asset external reference code.

file.description: Optional field with the embedded file, can be embedded with nestedFields

fileTypeIcon.description: The shared asset file type icon.

fileTypeIconColor.description: The shared asset file type icon color.

shareable.description: Whether the shared asset is shareable or not

siteName.description: The name of the site to which this shared asset is scoped.

visible.description: If the shared asset is visible or not.

Site.description: Represents the site where the content is created. Properties follow the [WebSite](https://schema.org/WebSite) specification.

roleBriefs.description: A list of the user's roles.

embeddedTaxonomyCategory.description: Optional field with the embedded taxonomy category, can be embedded with nestedFields

taxonomyCategoryReference.description: A unique reference to a taxonomy category.

externalReferenceCode.description: The taxonomy category's external reference code.

siteKey.description: The key of the site or asset library where the taxonomy category is located.

accountBriefs.description: A list of the user's account.

additionalName.description: The user's additional name (e.g., middle name).

alternateName.description: The user's alias or screen name.

creator.description: The user who created this user account.

currentPassword.description: The user's current password. Used to authenticate a user when they attempt to update their own password.

dashboardURL.description: A relative URL to the user's dashboard.

dateCreated.description: The creation date of the user's account.

dateModified.description: The last time any field of the user's account was changed.

externalReferenceCode.description: The optional external key of this user account.

hasLoginDate.description: A flag that indicates whether the user has been signed in.

honorificPrefix.description: The user's title (e.g., Dr., Mr., Mrs, Ms., etc.).

honorificSuffix.description: The user's suffix (e.g., II, Jr., PhD, etc.).

image.description: A relative URL to the user's profile image.

imageExternalReferenceCode.description: The user's profile image external reference code.

keywords.description: A list of keywords describing the user.

lastLoginDate.description: The last time the user logged in.

organizationBriefs.description: A list of the user's organizations.

profileURL.description: A relative URL to the user's profile.

roleBriefs.description: A list of the user's roles.

siteBriefs.description: A list of the user's sites.

taxonomyCategoryBriefs.description: The categories associated with this user.

emailAddresses.description: A list of the user's email addresses, with one optionally marked as primary.

postalAddresses.description: A list of user's postal addresses, with one optionally marked as primary.

telephones.description: A list of the user's phone numbers, with one optionally marked as primary.

webUrls.description: A list of the user's web URLs, with one optionally marked as primary.

userGroupBriefs.description: A list of the user's userGroups.

UserAccountBrief.description: Represents a user's basic information, to be embedded in other resources like UserGroup.

alternateName.description: The user's alias or screen name.

externalReferenceCode.description: The optional external key of this user account.

UserAccountFullNameDefinition.description: Represents the definition of the user full name.

userAccountFullNameDefinitionFields.description: A list of the user's account.

UserAccountFullNameDefinitionField.description: Represents the definition of a single part of the user full name.

creator.description: The user who created the user group.

dateModified.description: The user group's most recent modification date.

roleBriefs.description: The list of roles associated with this user group.

userAccountBriefs.description: The list of users associated with this user group.

externalReferenceCode.description: The user group's external reference code.

WebUrl.description: Represents a URL to an external site. This is modeled internally as a `WebSite`.

externalReferenceCode.description: The optional external key of this URL.

primary.description: A flag that identifies whether this is the main web address of the user/organization.

info.description: A Java client JAR is available for use with the group ID 'com.liferay', artifact ID 'com.liferay.headless.admin.user.client', and version '4.0.81'.

The set of available headers are: Accept-Language (string), Host (string), User-Agent (string), X-Browser (string), X-Cookies (collection string), X-Device-Brand (string), X-Device-Model (string), X-Device-Screen-Resolution-Height (double), X-Device-Screen-Resolution-Width (double), X-Last-Sign-In-Date-Time (date time) and X-Signed-In (boolean). Local date will be always present in the request.
